author: Jaime Nagase
description: All-in-one life dashboard for habits, tasks, fitness, nutrition and studies, stored as plain Markdown notes in your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Momentum Life

name: Momentum Life

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Momentum Life 0.2.2

Cleaner source and review.

### Changed
- Removed the optional local-command bridge from the main source entirely. The plugin now only talks to cloud AI providers over HTTPS and never touches Node.js `child_process`, so the source review no longer reports shell-execution risk. (The bridge lives on the separate `local` branch for anyone who wants to self-compile it.)
- Use Obsidian's `createDiv` helper instead of `createEl("div", …)` in a couple of card views.

No changes to the AI providers you use (Gemini, Claude, Grok, OpenAI-compatible) or any other feature.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Momentum Life 0.2.1

### Changed
- The optional desktop-only "local command" bridge (which ran a local CLI via `child_process`) is now **excluded from the community build**. The distributed plugin no longer bundles `child_process` and cannot execute local programs, so it no longer triggers the shell-execution flag.
- The bridge still lives in the source behind a build flag for anyone who wants it in a self-compiled build (`npm run build:local`).

The cloud AI providers (Gemini, Claude, Grok, OpenAI-compatible) are unchanged. No other functional changes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Momentum Life 0.2.0

First 0.2 release. Consolidates everything shipped in the 0.1.8–0.1.11 line into a stable minor version.

Included since 0.1.7:
- **Personal Finances** module: ledger, monthly stats, category donut, 6-month trend, and recurring costs organized as collapsible weeks with apply-week/apply-month and starter templates.
- **AI assistant** side panel with multiple providers (Gemini, Claude, Grok, OpenAI-compatible) that can propose data changes with a confirmation step.
- **Tasks ↔ Markdown** two-way sync so other plugins can read and edit the same tasks.
- Currency selector, past-date logging and per-day delete for Fitness and Nutrition, clearer calendar states.
- A "What's new" dialog on update.
- Reproducible release builds with verified artifact attestations.

Verified artifact attestations are attached to this release.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Momentum Life 0.1.11

Release pipeline fix.

### Fixed
- Release assets now build reproducibly so their attestations verify correctly. The lockfile was out of sync (it still referenced a removed dependency and an old version), which could make the released `main.js` and `styles.css` differ from a clean build and fail attestation checks. The release workflow now installs with `npm ci` against a synced lockfile.

No functional changes to the plugin itself — everything from 0.1.8 through 0.1.10 is included.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Momentum Life 0.1.10

Maintenance release.

### Improved
- The "What's new" dialog now shows the full details of the 0.1.8 and 0.1.9 changes, grouped by area (finances, AI assistant, tasks) so nothing is missed after an update.

No functional changes beyond the update dialog — everything from 0.1.8 (Personal Finances, AI assistant, two-way task lists) and the 0.1.9 sidebar de-duplication fix is included.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Momentum Life 0.1.9

A small maintenance release.

### Fixed
- Duplicated "Momentum Life" panels in the sidebar are now cleaned up automatically on startup. They could pile up when the workspace synced between desktop and mobile; the plugin now keeps a single panel of each type.

### New
- A "What's new" dialog. After you update, the plugin shows a short summary of what changed since the last version you opened.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Momentum Life 0.1.8

Big update. This release adds a full **Personal Finances** module, an **AI assistant** side panel, two-way **Tasks ↔ Markdown** sync, and lots of fixes across Fitness and Nutrition.

### New

**Personal Finances module**
- Full ledger with monthly stats: income, expenses and balance.
- Category donut chart (with currency values, compact center label like R$8.4k / R$1.2M) and a 6-month trend chart.
- Add-transaction bar with a date field, month navigation, and a settings gear.
- **Recurring costs**, organized as a month composed of weeks (Week 1: days 1–7 … Week 4: 22–end). Weeks are collapsible (collapsed by default) and show an income / expense / net summary. Apply a single week or the whole month at once. Starter templates on the empty state to get going fast.
- **Currency selector** in the main plugin settings — the whole dashboard updates live when you change it.

**AI assistant (side panel)**
- New right-sidebar chat panel (ribbon icon + "Open AI assistant" command) that reads a snapshot of your Momentum data (tasks, habits, fitness, nutrition, finances) to give grounded answers.
- Multiple providers: Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, xAI Grok, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (custom base URL). Settings show only the fields each provider needs, and API mode vs local mode are mutually exclusive.
- Optional desktop-only "Local command" bridge for a locally installed CLI (personal use, hidden on mobile).
- **The AI can now propose changes to your data** — create/complete/delete a task, add a transaction, or add a recurring cost. It never applies anything directly: you get a "Proposed changes" panel and confirm with Apply/Cancel first. Works across every provider since it uses a portable JSON action format.

**Tasks ↔ Markdown checkbox lists (two-way sync)**
- Each board mirrors to `Tasks/Lists/<Board>/tasks.md` using standard `- [ ]` / `- [x]` checkboxes, so other plugins (e.g. Hearth) can read and edit the same tasks with folder scope.
- Board changes update the list, and editing the checkbox file updates the board — loop-guarded so there's no churn.

### Improved
- Fitness and Nutrition calendars are fully clickable: log workouts and meals on past dates directly, no separate "Add" flow needed.
- Per-day delete (🗑) in the day-detail header for both Fitness and Nutrition.
- Clearer calendar states (today / selected / hover) so the selected day is never ambiguous.
- Data folder now defaults to the plugin name ("Momentum Life"); existing installs keep their previous folder automatically.

### Fixed
- Filename collision bug where transactions/workouts logged close together could overwrite each other (added a unique suffix).
- Currency changes now reflect on already-entered data instead of showing raw numbers.
- Nutrition: edits to a meal plan no longer leak into the wrong meal (e.g. dinner edits landing in lunch).
- Task board labels no longer disappear when navigating between boards / kanban / lists.
